episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 479: Best of Final Fantasy x MTG
episode.description: James and Cliff get down to business with all the latest in Magic card price movement, Modern meta analysis, cards to watch and their breakdown of the best cards from Final Fantasy x MTG.
